name: 5dim_transport
title: 5Dim's mod - Transport
author: 5Dim
description:
Transport module for 5Dim's mod (Requires Bob's Inserters)
Expands item transportation with faster belts and more capable inserters
This mod includes:
- 10 tiers of transport belts
- 10 tiers of underground belts (plus x30 and x50 extended range variants)
- 10 tiers of splitters
- 8 tiers of loaders
- 10 tiers of inserters (standard, filter, stack and stack filter)
- 10 tiers of pumps
- 30-tile and 50-tile underground pipe variants
